faqs.a: Yes. It handles URL-safe variants and optional padding differences for common API/token payloads.

faqs.q: Does Base64 encoding protect secrets?
faqs.a: No. Base64 is an encoding format, not encryption. Treat encoded values as readable data.

faqs.q: Why does Base32 output include equals signs?
faqs.a: Padding keeps output aligned to Base32 block boundaries for decoder compatibility.
